title: Muninn project view frontmatter (projects/<name>.md)
description: The frontmatter contract of a curated view page (SPEC §5.6, ADR-0002, format 1.0). A project is a view, not a container: membership lives here, never on the member (sources stay immutable, I1), and listing an id is a link, not provenance. The page body is a deterministic projection (ADR-0017), never authored prose. Unknown fields are permitted (§5). Member resolution (L11) and scope semantics are enforced by the linter.

id.description: Stable id. The one canonical global hub seeded by init has id `global` (ADR-0018).

description.description: A plain maintainer LABEL — never read as a sourced claim.

members.description: Ids this view gathers (links, not provenance). Required but MAY be empty — an empty view is valid (e.g. the freshly seeded global hub).

scope.description: `global` marks a view whose members are cross-cutting; synthesize unions every global view into scope (§5.6). Absent defaults to project.
